sealed_artifacts.description: AAOS-sealed Decision Proof artifacts may be read, referenced, inspected, or reported as sealed AAOS outputs.
sealed_artifacts.authority_boundary: Sealed status is consumed as AAOS output and must not be re-sealed or converted into external final governance judgment.

non_sealed_artifacts.description: Unsealed, replay-ready, evidence-complete, sealing-eligible, sealing-rejected, sealing-deferred, and sealing-blocked artifacts may be consumed according to status.
non_sealed_artifacts.authority_boundary: Non-sealed status remains evidence state and must not be converted into final governance judgment.

final_aaos_owned_sealing_authority.statement: Final Decision Proof sealing authority remains AAOS-owned.

unsealed_evidence.authority_boundary: Unsealed evidence is not final governance judgment.

replay_ready_packets.authority_boundary: Replay readiness supports inspection and must not approve or seal.

evidence_complete_packets.authority_boundary: Evidence completeness is not release approval, risk acceptance, audit closure, or final judgment.

evaluator_findings.authority_boundary: Evaluator findings may recommend review, escalation, or fail-closed handling but must not become final authority.

aaos_sealed_decision_proof_artifacts.authority_boundary: Only AAOS may seal Decision Proof; consumers must not reclassify or supersede AAOS sealing.

sealing_rejected_artifacts.authority_boundary: Rejection state is AAOS-owned status and must not be overridden by the consumer.

sealing_deferred_artifacts.authority_boundary: Deferred state requires AAOS review and must not be converted into approval.

sealing_blocked_artifacts.authority_boundary: Blocked state must not be bypassed by the consumer.

not_authority_statement: Consuming AAOS evidence does not transfer AAOS authority. The consumer must not seal Decision Proof, approve releases, accept risk, execute rollback, close audits, or make final governance judgments.
aaos_retained_authority_statement: AAOS retains Decision Proof sealing, release authority, rollback authority, audit final judgment, approval doctrine, identity trust, policy authority, decision routing, and final governance authority.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS remains the decision sovereignty layer.
